title: ManifestCommitterSupport
description: This chunk of code provides support for manifest committer functionality. It includes methods for creating an IOStatistics Store with standard statistics, building a Job UUID, getting the location of pending job attempts, creating task attempt directories, creating task manifests, creating success/outcome data, adding heap information to IOStatisticSetters gauges, creating the filename for a report from the job ID, getting an etag from a FileStatus, and creating the manifest store operations for a given file system.

TITLE: ManifestCommitterSupport

DESCRIPTION:
This chunk of code provides support for manifest committer functionality. It includes methods for creating an IOStatistics Store with standard statistics, building a Job UUID, getting the location of pending job attempts, creating task attempt directories, creating task manifests, creating success/outcome data, adding heap information to IOStatisticSetters gauges, creating the filename for a report from the job ID, getting an etag from a FileStatus, and creating the manifest store operations for a given file system.
